input.background: A study looked at the number of cavity-free children per 100 in 16 North American cities BEFORE and AFTER public water fluoridation projects. Table 11.2 lists the data.
input.data:
\begin{table}
\captionsetup{labelformat=empty}
\caption{Table 11.2 Cavity-free children per 100 in 16 North American cities before and after public water fluoridation projects.}
\begin{tabular}{|l|l|}
\hline AFTER & BEFORE \\
\hline 49.2 & 18.2 \\
\hline 30.0 & 21.9 \\
\hline 16.0 & 5.2 \\
\hline 47.8 & 20.4 \\
\hline 3.4 & 2.8 \\
\hline 16.8 & 21.0 \\
\hline 10.7 & 11.3 \\
\hline 5.7 & 6.1 \\
\hline 23.0 & 25.0 \\
\hline 17.0 & 13.0 \\
\hline 79.0 & 76.0 \\
\hline 66.0 & 59.0 \\
\hline 46.8 & 25.6 \\
\hline 84.9 & 50.4 \\
\hline 65.2 & 41.2 \\
\hline 52.0 & 21.0 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
input.question: Estimate the mean change with 95% confidence.
